channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Mona Khalil, Lebanon’s turtle advocate, dies after Israeli attack
item.description: Khalil spent more than two decades protecting the nests of endangered turtle species in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Australia pledges action on H5N1 after bird flu case confirmed
item.description: Australia confirmed its first mainland H5N1 bird flu case in a seabird near Esperance, WA.

item.title: US envoy headed for Switzerland, Israeli strikes on Lebanon threaten talks
item.description: US media are reporting that Witkoff and Kushner are preparing for negotiations with Iran after talks were postponed.

item.title: ‘We tasted the horrors of war’: Stories of refugees who returned home
item.description: In 2025, nearly 15 million displaced people returned - the largest surge of returns recorded by the UN.

item.title: Iran war day 113: Tehran presses US over Lebanon ceasefire
item.description: Iran presses US over Lebanon as Israeli strikes test fragile ceasefire and broader peace efforts.

item.title: What pushed the number of displaced people down?
item.description: Global displacement fell for the first time in a decade. On World Refugee Day, AJLabs looks at what drove millions home.

item.title: Turkiye knocked out of World Cup 2026 after 1-0 defeat to 10-man Paraguay
item.description: Turkiye suffered their second successive defeat in North America, bringing an end to their World Cup campaign.

item.title: Inferno rips through Dominican Republic beach resort
item.description: Inferno rips through Dominican Republic beach resort

item.title: Israel fetes Somaliland’s leader as it seeks to expand Red Sea influence
item.description: Six months after recognition, Israel and Somaliland say they are moving from symbolism to strategic cooperation.

item.title: UN meeting erupts over sexual violence allegations against Israel
item.description: “You will be quiet.” A UN meeting descended into a heated exchange.

item.title: Mexico City looks to rein in street drinking after massive World Cup party
item.description: Authorities collected some 40 tonnes of waste around Reforma Avenue, the historic centre, on Friday morning.

item.title: Hydration break boos: How FIFA united players, fans, coaches at World Cup
item.description: Criticism surrounding the breaks has been aimed at the commercial benefits for the three-minute pauses in action.

item.title: One dead and 89 injured following train collision in Bedford, UK
item.description: One person is dead and almost 90 injured, after two trains collided near Bedford, about 100km north of London.

item.title: Cunha hits Brazil double against Haiti to seal first World Cup 2026 win
item.description: Manchester United's Matheus Cunha scores Brazil's first two goals in 3-0 win against Haiti as FIFA event progress nears.

item.title: Lebanese influencer organises World Cup event amid Israel’s attack on Leban
item.description: As Israel’s war on Lebanon rages, hundreds gather in Rmeileh by Sidon Gate to watch the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Morocco beat Scotland 1–0 as Saibari scores fastest World Cup 2026 goal
item.description: Morocco hold onto slender lead despite Scotland's late charge for an equaliser in Group C match at Boston Stadium.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran says US must ensure Israel ends attacks on Lebanon
item.description: Iranian deputy foreign minister says Iran 'ready to move forward' on diplomacy with US, but war must end on all fronts.

item.title: US judge rejects Joe Biden’s lawsuit asking to withhold memoir recordings
item.description: Biden, a former Democratic president, argued that releasing the recordings would violate his right to privacy.

item.title: Thirty dead at DRC displacement camp as Ebola threat grows
item.description: At least 30 people have died since May in the Kigonze displacement camp in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

item.title: USA beat Australia 2–0 to book knockout spot at World Cup
item.description: An own goal and a goal by Alex Freeman helped the home side maintain a perfect record and progress to the round of 32.

item.title: Spain’s Yamal says ‘very early, unnecessary’ to play full World Cup match
item.description: 'It's not the time to play a whole match,' Lamine Yamal said ahead of Spain's match against Saudi Arabia.

item.title: Canada’s Kone undergoes major leg surgery; to miss rest of World Cup
item.description: Kone is expected to make a full recovery after breaking his left leg, with multiple fractures, in the match against Qatar.

item.title: Does Trump have to submit the Iran memorandum of understanding to Congress?
item.description: A 2015 law requiring congressional approval for any Iran nuclear deal is in the spotlight after this week's memo.

item.title: US announces new round of Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington next week
item.description: Talks come as Hezbollah, Israel say new ceasefire has been reached in wake of US-Iran memorandum to end war.

item.title: Italian Prime Minister says she didn’t ‘beg’ Trump for G7 photograph
item.description: Italian Prime Minister says she didn't ‘beg’ Trump for G7 photograph.
